notes: v370 — the Signal report card now grades over MUCH more history. Before, the app loaded only ~95 days of prices per share, which left the grader just ~28 days of usable window — that thin window is the main reason so many signals read 'TOO EARLY' (not enough examples yet, rather than weak signals). Now it loads ~200 days and grades over ~6 months, so every signal has roughly 4–5× more fires behind its score — edges prove themselves (or don't) far faster, and the SOLID / PROMISING tiers become much more reliable. Because history is fetched one request per share either way, this is just a little more data per download, not more downloads, so loading shouldn't slow much — tell me if it does and I'll dial it back. Bonus: the deeper history also makes the longer-term signals (like the 200-day trend) accurate. Nothing about your balances, holdings or the auto-pilot changed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v370.
